creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 166369
Update shotwell to a git snapshot

Update to a snapshot, to fix ssl cert validation. Sadly it doesn't look upstream shotwell is still active so we need to update to a snapshot. Also to fix this they had to port it to webkit2gtk3.

Announcement: https://mail.gnome.org/archives/distributor-list/2016-January/msg00000.html
upstream bug: https://bugzilla.gnome.org/show_bug.cgi?id=751709
